name: Arceus

forms.name: Fighting
forms.pokedexDescription: Three beings whose power can hold both time and space fixed. The rift is born of disorder on the other side of this world.

forms.name: Flying
forms.pokedexDescription: The being poured the remains of its power into stone and buried it deep.

forms.name: Poison
forms.pokedexDescription: The rules of time and space change within the opposite world.

forms.name: Ground
forms.pokedexDescription: When the universe was created, its shards became this Plate.

forms.name: Rock
forms.pokedexDescription: It gathers power from the Plates, listening for the flute's song.

forms.name: Bug
forms.pokedexDescription: Where all creation was born, that is the being's place of origin.

forms.name: Ghost
forms.pokedexDescription: The other side of this world was given by the Original One to its raging third.

forms.name: Steel
forms.pokedexDescription: That which fills the other side of the world can shape the rage and mold it.

forms.name: Fire
forms.pokedexDescription: The power of defeated giants infuses this Plate.

forms.name: Water
forms.pokedexDescription: The rightful bearer of a Plate draws from the Plate it holds.

forms.name: Grass
forms.pokedexDescription: The powers of Plates are shared among Pokémon.

forms.name: Electric
forms.pokedexDescription: The third being raged, raining down bolts of anger.

forms.name: Psychic
forms.pokedexDescription: The Original One breathed alone before the universe came.

forms.name: Ice
forms.pokedexDescription: Two beings of time and space set free from the Original One.

forms.name: Dragon
forms.pokedexDescription: Three beings were born to bind time and space.

forms.name: Dark
forms.pokedexDescription: Two make matter, and three make spirit, shaping the world.

forms.name: Fairy
forms.pokedexDescription: The Original One is in all things. The Original One is nowhere at all. From all creations, over all creations, does the Original One watch over all.

pokedexDescription: It is told in mythology that this Pokémon was born before the universe even existed.
